# AdmireTech — AI-Powered Digital Agency

> AI agency helping businesses transform with intelligent solutions. Offices in London, Pune, and Lagos.

## About
AdmireTech is a global AI agency founded in 2015 in England. We have 13 team members across 7 countries, specialising in AI chatbots, automation, custom development, and consulting. We deliver measurable ROI through production-grade AI solutions.

## Services
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.admireit.co/services/ai-chatbots): Custom AI chatbots for customer support, lead generation, and internal workflows.
- [AI Automation](https://www.admireit.co/services/ai-automation): Intelligent workflow automation, document processing, and custom integrations.
- [Custom Development](https://www.admireit.co/services/custom-development): Full-stack web and mobile applications with deep AI integration.
- [AI Consulting](https://www.admireit.co/services/ai-consulting): AI readiness assessments, strategy roadmaps, and implementation guidance.
- [Outcome-Based Development](https://www.admireit.co/services/outcome-based-development): Pay-per-feature model with aligned incentives.
- [Fractional AI Developers](https://www.admireit.co/services/fractional-ai-developers): On-demand AI and ML engineering talent.
